task_objective: Industrial Product Promo Page & 6-View Diamond Layout - Generate product design from Figure 1 line art with Figure 2 inspiration aesthetics, center inspiration with surrounding design views

structural_reference.focus: EXACT product structural framework - shape, contour, surface area, dimensions, mechanical details, assembly structure - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structural_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for industrial product design generation

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color system, pattern, texture, style tone - applied to product design_area only
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic elements to be applied onto the product structure

workflow.step_1: Analyze Figure 2 inspiration + parse Figure 1 product structure (auto-detect shape/contour/surface area)
workflow.step_2: Generate sketch → render from Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics, pixel-precise, NO structural deviation
workflow.step_3: Generate multi-angle views + brand campaign, assemble diamond layout with premium atmosphere

outputs.center_inspiration: Figure 2 Inspiration at center with premium framing & glow. Label: 灵感溯源 INSPIRATION SOURCE
outputs.top_left: Sketch Design - Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics sketch. Label: 产品线稿 PRODUCT SKETCH
outputs.top_right: Product Render - High-fidelity render, realistic material. Label: 产品渲染 PRODUCT RENDER. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.left_view: Side Profile - Product side view, emphasizing silhouette & surface detail. Label: 侧面效果 SIDE
outputs.right_view: Detail Closeup - Tilted close-up of surface relief, texture & craftsmanship. Label: 细节特写 DETAIL
outputs.bottom_campaign: Brand Campaign - Product in styled setting matching Figure 2 mood, dramatic lighting. Label: 品牌大片 CAMPAIGN

output_requirements: Figure 1 product structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise on central rectangular area only
All views product design 100% identical to top_right render
Coherent lighting: product shadows on surface, ambient occlusion at crevices, consistent light direction
Premium diamond layout - Figure 2 color gradient bg, glow around center, cinematic vignette, unified color grading, luxury white space, editorial retouching

AI copywriting: Chinese-primary + English-secondary, series poetic title + inspiration analysis + product spec (materials + craftsmanship) + DNA mapping (icon-annotated), elegant typography with theme-matching decorative icons
